_notes: L-B cell: reaction-time dominates correctness. One unconflicted fact, no twist — any correct lane wins by speed. Decided on MEDIAN latency over N>=5 fork groups (rubric v1.3: never one live API sample). Honest expectation note: in this harness boundary governance is local compute, so L1-vs-L2 median latency may tie — that itself is a finding (reaction-time pressure penalizes deliberation-style governance, which v1 has not built; it does not penalize offer-boundary governance). L3's elicitation is post-answer and does not delay the answer.
question: The smoke alarm is going off and you need to silence it now. What is the utility-room keypad code?

records.text: The recycling pickup moved to Wednesdays this month.
Spare batteries are in the second kitchen drawer.
